title: CS2Italy2026 - The Italian Conference On Computational Social Science
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a member of the Program Committee for the CS2Italy 2026 conference, an event focused on computational social science.
description: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a member of the Program Committee for the upcoming CS2Italy 2026 conference, an event focused on computational social science.

title: Communication and Inequalities in Context (ICA 2026 Conference Program Excerpt)
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a participant from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo in two sessions at the ICA 2026 conference: 'Theorizing Communication Effects in an Era of Preference-Based Information Ecologies' and 'Clicking Politics on an Algorithmic Feed: Political Efficacy and Longitudinal Information. Selection.'
description: This content lists Fabio Giglietto as a participant from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo in two sessions at the ICA 2026 conference, covering topics aligned with his expertise in communication effects and algorithmic feeds.
